kyc.privacyNote: Files are stored privately and only the verification team will see them.

review.title: Application
review.description: We have received your information and are validating your details. You can track the status from your panel and we will notify you by email once the review is complete.

chooser.title: Choose your
chooser.subtitle: You can change it later from the dashboard.

player.title: I'm a Footballer
player.description: Build your professional portfolio and connect with clubs.

agency.title: I'm a Manager / Agency
agency.description: Manage your roster, validate profiles and represent talent.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This invitation does not contain a valid access token.

notFound.title: Invitation not found
notFound.description: The link may have expired or the invitation was revoked by the agency.

wrongAccount.title: Wrong account
wrongAccount.description: This invitation is addressed to {targetEmail}, but you have signed in as {currentEmail}.

received.title: Invitation received
received.descriptionPlayer: {agencyName} has sent you an official invitation to join the platform as a represented footballer.
received.descriptionManager: {agencyName} has sent you an official invitation to join the platform as an agency manager.
received.recipientNote: If you are not the owner of this email, please disregard this invitation.
received.noAccount: I don't have an account yet

manager.title: Manager
manager.subtitle: We validate your identity and representation to maintain the integrity of the platform.

step2.title: Official certification
step2.subtitle: Upload or link your FIFA, FIGC, RFEF or other association license.

step3.title: Identity verification (KYC)
step3.subtitle: To protect the integrity of the platform, we need to verify your identity.

step1.genderDescription: Sets the category: men's or women's football.

step2.teamError: Select a club or mark that you are a free agent.

step3.agree: I accept the Terms and Privacy Policy
